description: Launch iTerm2 and open terminal sessions.
author: colorfulDots

commands.name: New iTerm2 Window
commands.target:
tell application "iTerm"
activate
create window with default profile
end tell
commands.description: Open a new iTerm2 window with the default profile

commands.name: New iTerm2 Tab
commands.target:
tell application "iTerm"
activate
tell current window to create tab with default profile
end tell
commands.description: Open a new tab in the current iTerm2 window
